creator: harry@omnisec.de
text:
Attached is a simple patch to add the Epson Perfection 3490
	to the uscanner supported devices.
	Please note that I don't have any man page knowledge, so
	man page should also be updated.

Fix: 

Apply the attached patch and recompile uscanner/kernel.
	I don't know if I can add the patch here so maybe it's in a
	follow up message.
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
